prompt:
"A horizontal 4-panel fashion editorial grid, each panel featuring the same American white man with sharp jawline and defined facial features, each panel has a completely different outfit, pose, lighting, and vibe seamlessly arranged side by side:
Panel 1 All-white oversized zip-up jacket, wide-leg cargo trousers, chunky white sneakers, silver chain, futuristic sunglasses, hands in pockets, relaxed confident pose, solid deep royal blue background, cold blue rim lighting, clean editorial vibe
Panel 2 — Black leather biker jacket, slim dark jeans, combat boots, gold chain, casual hair, leaning against wall with arms crossed, solid burnt orange background, warm moody tungsten lighting, street fashion vibe
Panel 3 — Olive green military cargo jacket, beige tactical trousers, chunky boots, backwards cap, one hand raised adjusting cap, solid dark charcoal background, dramatic single spotlight from above, rugged urban vibe
Panel 4 — Cream luxury turtleneck sweater, tailored camel overcoat, brown loafers, minimalist watch, standing straight with subtle smirk, solid deep emerald green background, soft diffused warm lighting, high-end luxury fashion vibe
All panels same male subject, consistent face, ultra sharp detail, seamless grid layout, horizontal landscape format 16:5. Ultra photorealistic, 8K, no text overlays, cinematic color grading."
